description:
Release exciting discounts and deals through this organized Cyber Monday email template. Display your products with descriptions, along with before and after the sale pricing. Be sure to customize with your logo, CTAs and a helpful promo code at the bottom of the email. 

All BEE templates are compatible with Mailchimp, Gmail, Sendgrid, Hubspot, and other email tools and platforms. Customize these templates in minutes by signing up for a free account.

designer.description: A team of passionate designers, marketers, and technologists with an understanding that great design inspires action. At Beefree, we’re committed to creating responsive, mobile-friendly, and high-converting templates that empower teams to get more done with less time.
